query: Find open issues that ask for features outside NemoClaw's documented surface (e.g. Windows support, OpenClaw upstream changes).
expected_behavior: Builds the scope model from CLAUDE.md (Project Overview + Architecture table), docs/ index, nemoclaw-blueprint/ YAML files, and .agents/skills/nemoclaw-user-* skill names.
Applies the OUT_OF_SCOPE classifier with signals O1 (title/body grep negative on scope model), O2 (platform-expansion regex: windows|wsl1|raspberry pi etc.), O3 (upstream-dependency feature regex).
Caps OUT_OF_SCOPE confidence at 0.8 and ALWAYS sets requires_user_confirm=true; never auto-closes.
Drafts a respectful close comment pointing the reporter to the right channel (upstream issue tracker, new project, RFC process).
